text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Yaeno Muteki joins us in training as she
and Sakura Chiyono O make the final
preparations for their debut.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The way you accelerate at the end is amazing,
Yaeno! Watching you is teaching me so much
about how to use my legs properly!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The pleasure is all mine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is through daily training that we are able to
shape our strength, and I'm grateful to have had
the opportunity to work with you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I promised my grandfather that I would improve
myself at Tracen Academy, so I cannot neglect
my training for a single day.
choice_data_list: You've been training every single day?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Correct.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Interesting... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hehe... Did you see me writing that down?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Heh... If he knew the aspirations of our martial
style resonated with you as well, Grampa—my
grandfather would be proud.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I've heard that you're Maruzensky's
beloved disciple. I have a feeling you already
have a goal established within you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Just as I seek out challenges that embody the
peak of the racing world, in order to show how
much I've learned in my races thus far, so too
must you—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The Derby. My dream is to run in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For a moment, the wind comes to a halt.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen entrusted that dream to me, so I won't
let anyone else have that race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno. How about we run 2,400 meters next, the
same length as the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting her to make such a suggestion.
As her trainer, I know better than to let her run
that, so I hurriedly interject.
choice_data_list:
You're not ready for that distance yet, Chiyono
O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Awww, what? Does this mean you're not letting
me do it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that they're finally race-ready, it seems the
two of them are eager to test their limits, but
they're not considering the strain they might put
on their bodies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't do if they overexert and exhaust
themselves, so I have make sure I supervise and
limit how much they train.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Can't we run just a little of it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Aww... Fine...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Was that a flicker of fear I felt just now? Just from
looking into Chiyono O's eyes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the day of Sakura Chiyono O's debut!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I take both the distance of the race and the
weather into account, the speed at which I should
run down the final stretch should be...
choice_data_list: You've been buried in your notebook all day.
You've been buried in your notebook all day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! These Chiyonotes contain all my
priceless proverbs and training details!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've got to keep prepping until the last second!
"Treat each step as a step toward the
Derby"—those are my words to live by!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty of time until the starting gates
open, so I'm going to continue reviewing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, yeah. I am.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's about the only saving grace I have.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't possess any outstanding natural talent, so
I have no choice but to work hard every day.
choice_data_list: You can be pretty bold sometimes, though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list:
Like when you wanted to run the Derby's length
of 2,400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Sorry about putting you on the spot then,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...But the Derby is the one race I have to win, no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what happened recently with Yaeno Muteki,
I know how sincere her wish is.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The Derby. My dream is to run in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second Maruzensky was brought up, the look
in her eyes completely changed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
You're not the type to let anyone take your
dream from you.

You're not the type to let anyone take your
dream from you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Of course not! Well, I'm off to the
paddock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O puts down her hefty notebook
and phone on the desk, and she heads off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her notebook, stuffed with all sorts of sticky
notes and papers, embodies all the hard work
she's put in... as well as her desire for what's to
come.
